overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense vegetation at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring a large rock outcrop on the right side of the path. The atmosphere is dark and isolated with no other characters or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail illuminated by flashlight

events.description: large rock outcrop becomes clearly visible ahead on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail using a flashlight to illuminate the path ahead through dense vegetation

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path through dense vegetation
dense green bushes and small trees lining the left side
thick undergrowth and vegetation on the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail at night illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. Dense vegetation lines both sides of the path, and a large rock outcrop gradually approaches from the right side, growing larger in the frame as the camera advances.

events.description: slight rightward curve in the trail as the camera passes the rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing the large rock formation on the right and proceeding deeper into the dark forest corridor

segments.scene_description: Passing alongside the large rock outcrop on the right, the camera continues forward as the formation recedes into the distance. The trail curves slightly through the dense vegetation corridor, with the flashlight illuminating the path ahead as the rock disappears behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark, narrow dirt trail that transitions from an approach toward a massive rock formation to a departure from it. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the night, illuminating dense vegetation that crowds both sides of the path. As the camera advances, a large rock outcrop gradually emerges from the right, growing in scale and dominating the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera passes alongside the stone wall, causing the formation to recede into the darkness behind. Finally, the trail curves slightly forward through the corridor of greenery, with the light focusing on the path ahead as the rock disappears from view.
